textByHash.073a8e805c2d914c06215e4772ddee6b3686bb25: Hello, do you have a cat?
textByHash.1cad6e085337000706938c24b5b76086bcf53d43: It's just not the same without Bob around.
textByHash.2bca7d7aba12070bb0e4d98a9d2d426fc66eb3ed: Hmph, well, this week he hasn't come back for his food and I'm worried.
textByHash.3d5f4d502d31ba34bf966ffa8c093f702b779bad: I am so glad to see you Doctor!
textByHash.4ab85b9de85620d74fdf978e8035de1a610973ac: Just a Doctor... please hurry... I don't think I'll last long...
textByHash.4c9dafefd814fb70a3c1cb6f4c588f194efb2384: He must be hungry by now!
textByHash.4e1a2f7c0072fb0608c614b50163ad3e41cb2544: I do! His name is Bob but I can't find him!
textByHash.55e4380fb3ca06753ad7b598ed892bf8b823b940: Have you spoken to Hild about locating Bob?
textByHash.57eeef17af0ace257d9e48928bc11b7d6c49ecdc: She lives in the village, just follow the path north a little.
textByHash.5e6e29c20d4a78fce36a7f35801de32e786281c0: I am not a well man!
textByHash.6997a872dfc7ae8214bb044ee3fd1bce404cfa5f: Fat lot of use you were! He came home on his own!
textByHash.7ee628e48c2e63ec3ca05486032b0532663a5211: No you're not! A Doctor wouldn't be holding that!
textByHash.8901134e96a79914b4ead91d3799b7d8f49319b7: Do you want to help or not?!
textByHash.8bfd812e77010e99945f5750e1fc36deecc6982d: Hello! Bob came home today! I'm so happy!
textByHash.8f9eb488f7bf634a8e25b5e56caecfa1382158d2: Wow! What can I say... I feel special!
textByHash.98fc83c2ef16efee6822486166391461dfcbc031: Hello, I see you have a cat.
textByHash.9e887683bdda73e80e0db5d3f325156135d12ab4: My friend Hild is cleverer than me...
textByHash.a06fc81bc1984576d30d5033edf087e8a60fb665: Before you go, I found the strangest thing. There was a package left under the bed, it's addressed to you.
textByHash.a2d3b552e2495f7efa621de8fb00ef14682d88ae: I don't want to leave the house in case Bob comes back.
textByHash.b68af2e2edf5f90b6cd01fd658a1c86ac8bf570e: Would you? Oh that would be so great!
textByHash.ba7fb37c6e16c35b6ad4be79df123e5b5de9fb26: Well he usually comes back to me once a week. Usually a Wednesday a bit before lunchtime.
textByHash.be49cc9bbd110a3a339af210827b230c037f37f7: I haven't seen him for a week! What am I to do?!
textByHash.cc5ac8f559287b62f0784742402f11b4e858c274: I think my arm is broken!
textByHash.d279bc28ccc354d926bc8fb47b189897662cd4a2: Where was I? Oh yes... my friend Hild might be able to locate where Bob is, she lives in the house just up the road.
textByHash.de19840a57aa1d08363eeebc6a78a99dc079a546: I think I need the Doctor...ugh...
textByHash.e88935913796343eb5d247be72e11a703a4d2380: Wait! I feel something! Yes! I can feel the potion working... The pain has gone... I can walk on my leg... Doctor! I'm cured!
textByHash.ff7a603823e0f8ce7e0bdb925e9e1c39cecbd3dd: Is that it?! I'm much more ill than that!
textByHash.ff7cf426177162b9be3e09e7d330d6d3787239c7: Gertrude asked me if I'd like one of her new kittens. I don't think I'm ready for that yet.
textByHash.ffb85ed99e94fbf57de5e3e1e3c62d3047b6cdc6: Doctor Please take this seriously! I demand treatment!
